items.title: [Scotto] The Los Angeles Lakers have officially renounced the free agent rights to LeBron James, Carmelo Anthony, Dwight Howard, Dion Waiters, Luke Kennard, Marcus Smart, Maxi Kleber, Nick Smith Jr, Jared Dudley, Avery Bradley, Jaxson Hayes, Markieff Morris, and Wayne Ellington.
items.author: JoeBiden2020FTW
items.body_excerpt: Interesting drop from Mike Scotto. I wonder if renouncing Jaxson Hayes decreases the likelihood of a Kessler-Hayes double S&T with the Jazz. Source

items.title: The Los Angeles Lakers have officially renounced the free agent rights to LeBron James, Carmelo Anthony, Dwight Howard, Dion Waiters, Luke Kennard, Marcus Smart, Maxi Kleber, Nick Smith Jr, Jared Dudley, Avery Bradley, Jaxson Hayes, Markieff Morris, and Wayne Ellington.

media.title: Lakers make contract decision on Nick Smith Jr.
media.description: The Los Angeles Lakers will reportedly decline the team option of guard Nick Smith Jr. to allow him to hit free agency.

items.title: The Los Angeles Lakers declined their team option for Nick Smith Jr., a league source told @spotrac.com.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
items.body_excerpt:
The Los Angeles Lakers declined their team option for Nick Smith Jr., a league source told @spotrac.com.

Smith will be an unrestricted free agent this offseason.
